title: Fix Telegram Proposal Approve Button Not Executing Proposals
summary: Telegram proposal approval callback approves proposals in the store but never dispatches execution. The button confirms approval but the executor never runs.

affectedFiles.description: Add dispatchApprovedProposal() call to the approval callback handler

executorPrompt: You are executing a code fix proposal. Read src/gateway/telegram-handler.ts lines 974-1006 to confirm the approveProposal() callback handler. Add the missing dispatchApprovedProposal(proposalId) call after the button is updated (line 999) and before the success message is sent (line 1000). Use find_replace_source to make this surgical edit. The function dispatchApprovedProposal already exists in the codebase — you are simply calling it where it was forgotten. After the edit is complete, call gateway_restart with a summary of the change.
